intended_use_full: Rapid OH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for suspicion of Obstructive Hydrocephalus (OH) in non-enhanced CT head images of adult patients. The device is intended to assist trained clinicians in workflow prioritization triage by providing notification of suspected findings in head CT images.
